founderNotebook.title: Founder Notebook
founderNotebook.summary: A reflective note built from recent work, recurring ideas, and the signals that deserve deeper attention.
founderNotebook.entry: This week’s notebook traces a recurring pattern: durable systems do not emerge from one large intervention, but from repeated small acts of operational clarity. The real work lies in turning scattered observations into steady design choices.

items.signal: Public systems and infrastructure conversations remain strong in the daily signal mix.

items.note: Readers are likely to value concise interpretation over pure volume.
